action.reasoning: Observation: /data only has dataset_info.json, eval_config.json is provided at test time. I have walk and stand models trained at 100k steps. Analysis: Need to submit eval to get baseline, then train remaining 8 tasks. Each task takes ~8.5 min at 100k steps. Decision: Submit eval now with current 2 models (others will use random policy), then train remaining 8 tasks with more steps in next iteration.
